drone_box.notes: Nested goal-box + penalty-box match found automatically; 4 independent px/m scale estimates agree within 0.8%.

smoketest.notes: No goal-box or penalty-box lines were confidently matched on this camera angle, so positions are shown schematically (relative layout within the frame), not as real pitch metres. Speeds and metric-only analyses (heatmaps, space-creation score) are skipped rather than faked.
